title: Downloading Software from the Campus Software Library
body: Access the Campus Software Library through the main Software Services page. Choose your Institution. Enter your NetID and password. Choose the software that you would like to download from the main Campus Software Library page. Follow the instructions on the page as to download permissions. Select the software that is correct for your platform and download! The download may be a large file. It is recommended that you are connected to the internet via a wired connection for the duration of the download. To install the software you may need to unzip the compressed package. You may use native tools for this process or download 7-Zip from http://www.7-zip.org/ For any issues downloading & installing software from the Campus Software Library, please contact the DoIT Help Desk .
